name: BBO and Deep Book Imbalance Consensus
hypothesis: A strong directional signal from the BBO (`obi_1`) is more reliable when confirmed by a similar imbalance in deeper book levels (`obi_ex_bbo`). This consensus indicates that both fast-moving HFTs and more patient, slower liquidity providers agree on the short-term price direction.
mutation_note: New signal based on Block C smoke tests, combining a classic primitive (obi_1) with a new one (obi_ex_bbo) to create a high-conviction entry.
